sources.title: Mum & Dad 2009 Dvdrip ( R)
sources.description: Lena, a young Polish immigrant working as a cleaner at an airport, is invited to the family home of a co-worker, which turns sinister quickly as the family intend to 'adopt' her.

metadata.Plot: Mum and Dad and their 'adopted' children, Birdie and Elbie, work at the airport and live off whatever they scavenge from cargo holds, offices, and hotels--including a steady stream of transient workers who populate the airport's soulless hub. When Lena, a young Polish office cleaner, is befriended by Birdie, she gets drawn into a nightmarish world of torture, murder, and perversity. Imprisoned in a suburban House of Horrors and designated a 'Mummy's Girl', Lena's only options appear to be to become part of the family--and join them in their insanity--or die.
metadata.Actors: Perry Benson, Dido Miles, Olga Fedori
